location: Dropped by the Fire Monk stationed in the encampment right at the Eastern Tableland grace, in eastern Liurnia of the Lakes. Also droppable from Fire Monks near the Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave in the Mountaintops of the Giants.
tactics: The Eastern Tableland camp also holds two Thorn Sorcerers, plus more patrolling Thorn Sorcerers and a Flame Chariot nearby — clear carefully rather than pulling everything at once.
Drop rate is modest (about 4% at 100 Discovery); resting at the grace to respawn the Monk and repeating the kill is the standard farm.
At Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave, the Monk is just down the stairs to the left of the entrance grace — an easier solo fight if you're already in that region.
lore: A mace carried by the fire-worshipping monks stationed near the giants' territory, its head imbued with an inner flame drawn from their devotion to fire.

builds.name: No-Investment Fire Damage
builds.why: Comes with innate fire damage baked in, so a Strength/Dexterity build gets extra elemental damage without spending points in Intelligence or Faith.
